brief_html: Contains the return value from MCP Startup.
remarks_html:
Contains the return value from MCP Startup.

Known return values:

  • 0x02, 0x0A-0x0D: Realm Unavailable: No Battle.net connection detected.
  • 0x7E: CDKey banned from realm play.
  • 0x7F: Temporary IP ban "Your connection has been temporarily restricted from this realm. Please try to log in at another time."
  • Else: Success.
